JUDGE:WILLIAM BURLEIGH/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:JANELLE LOPEZ C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. BOTH COUNSELS PRESENT W/O THEIR RESPECTIVE WITNESSES. JURY PANEL ARRAIVED FROM THE JURY ASSEMBLY ROOM. ROLL CALL MADE AND PANEL SWORN AS TO THEIR QUALIFICATIONS. JURY SELECTION BEGAN. JURY SWORN. ONE ALTERNATE CHOSEN AND SWORN. TRIAL BEGAN. OPENING STATEMENTS MADE BY BOTH SIDES. WITNESS CALLED BY PLFF (DEFT. ANTHONY JONES - MR. JONES PRESENT IN PM). JURY TRIAL CONT'D TO 9AM, 9/10/96.

CONT'D JURY TRIAL FROM 9/9/96: CAUSE CALLED. ALL PRESENT: JURY, ALTERNATE, PLFF'S COUNSEL, DEFT'S COUNSEL, WITH THE MUNI DRIVER ANTHONY JONES. COURT INFORMED THE JURY THAT PLFF'S WITNESS DID NOT APPEAR AND THIS JURY TRIAL IS CALLED OFF. COURT THANKED THE JURY FOR THEIR SERVICES. COURT INFORMED THAT HE IS ENTERING JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFT. CCSF.
